items.title: Been saying for weeks that LeBron James, at 41, is not seeking the highest possible salary. He's a billionaire. An NBA paycheck is a fraction of his income. Other factors will drive his decision about where to play in 2027-28.
items.author: Monte Poole
items.body_excerpt:
Been saying for weeks that LeBron James, at 41, is not seeking the highest possible salary. He's a billionaire. An NBA paycheck is a fraction of his income. Other factors will drive his decision about where to play in 2027-28.

The Warriors are very much in play.

items.author: Mike Lynch
items.body_excerpt: Aaron Nola has a 6.00+ ERA through 17 GS in consecutive seasons. Players his age or older who have done this are essentially finished. items.body_excerpt: The Celtics do not, by any means, have to trade Jaylen. He might be pissed. Maybe he’s ready to go. But he’s a true pro under contract for three more years. Anyone saying they must trade him is exaggerating, getting info from agents/other teams, desperate for content, or all three.

items.title: Small CBA thing to watch for with Raptors trades:
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Small CBA thing to watch for with Raptors trades:

They need to take back less salary than they send out, or else they're hard-capped at the 1st apron.

That's especially hard for them, as they have $6.6M in "unlikely" incentives that count for apron purposes (but not trade/cap).

items.title: LeBron James played with the Lakers for eight seasons, his longest single stint with a franchise. He averaged 34.9 points, 7.7 rebounds, and 7.9 assists per game. His accolades in LA include a title, eight All-Star appearances, and making seven All-NBA teams. What a run.

items.title: Spurs announce assistant Corliss Williamson will coach their Summer League squad in San Francisco and Las Vegas.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs announce assistant Corliss Williamson will coach their Summer League squad in San Francisco and Las Vegas.

Carter Bryant heads the team, which includes draft picks Jayden Quaintance, Tarris Reed Jr., Ja'Kobi Gillespie and Maliq Brown.

items.title: I find rivals-to-friends athlete trajectories really moving, emotionally: Federer-Nadal, Evert-Navratilova, etc. They say a lot about the human spirit.
items.author: Zach Kram
items.body_excerpt:
I find rivals-to-friends athlete trajectories really moving, emotionally: Federer-Nadal, Evert-Navratilova, etc. They say a lot about the human spirit.

LeBron and Steph teaming up after all the Cavs-Warriors Finals seems almost too remarkable to come true.

media.description: The Miami Heat’s first move on the first day of NBA free agency came ahead of free agency, agreeing to a one-year contract for the return of forward Simone Fontecchio.

items.title: Jokes aside, I think the Lakers are one of the most interesting team building situations in the league. A top 3 player and a highly complimentary backcourt partner locked in. Real cap flexibility and access to future picks. Premier market.
items.author: Shamit Dua
items.body_excerpt:
Jokes aside, I think the Lakers are one of the most interesting team building situations in the league. A top 3 player and a highly complimentary backcourt partner locked in. Real cap flexibility and access to future picks. Premier market.

They can go a lot of directions.
